properties.title: Hells Canyon Snake River 1/4-mile fire-restriction corridor

map_subfeatures.restriction_detail: Fire, campfire, and stove fire are prohibited within 1/4 mile of the Snake River from June 1 through September 30.
map_subfeatures.geometry_basis: 1/4 mile buffer around NHD large-scale Snake River flowline features for official river miles 247.5 to 176.0

properties.notes: Derived from official NHD large-scale flowline features selected by the official Hells Canyon Dam to Oregon-Washington border segment. The buffer is approximate and the Forest Service order remains the legal boundary.
